arts.ttl: Preview: Queens Park Rangers vs. Portsmouth - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Queens Park Rangers and Portsmouth, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: 'There’s so many silly conspiracy theories' - Portsmouth 'bust-up' between manager and defender scoffed at - AGAIN
arts.sum: Cold water has once again been poured on the ‘silly conspiracy theories’ that continue to accompany Conor Shaughnessy’s Pompey absence.

arts.ttl: 'Always potential' - Cardiff City's Alex Robertson to face Portsmouth for first time since Fratton Park departure
arts.sum: The Cardiff City star made 26 appearances during his short stay at Fratton Park

arts.ttl: ‘Not been quite at it’: Portsmouth boss’ honest call on skipper with midfield roles ‘up for grabs’ against QPR and Cardiff City
arts.sum: John Mousinho admitted skipper Marlon Pack’s starting place is under the spotlight as he weighs up midfield changes.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Portsmouth and Sheffield United hit with FA fine after Fratton Park confrontation
arts.sum: Pompey have been slapped with a £6,000 fine following their part in last month’s post-match skirmish with Sheffield United.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss' key QPR update over in-form Brighton loanee after international action
arts.sum: John Mousinho has reported a clean bill of health for his Pompey internationals.

arts.ttl: 'I wouldn't change what I said': No regrets for Portsmouth boss as he delivers strong message for QPR, Cardiff and Sheffield Wednesday clashes
arts.sum: Oxford United didn’t fulfil the ‘must win’ directive, nonetheless John Mousinho has no regrets over his battle cry.
